title: IDDD Bibliographic Inventory
public_claim: IDDD Bibliographic Inventory is a source packet for this package is the final handoff of a source-grounded field/discipline inventory extracted from the IDDD manuscript (Individual in the Democratic Dialectic, IDDD.docx, SHA-256 b0bd6d3f6db4be8cbc230c9371b08f10b56a1ea1221ad8524802cc73810f77e0, 40,838 paragraphs, 38,345 nonempty blocks, 8 tables, 3,596,306 characters, ~518,804 words).
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for IDDD Bibliographic Inventory, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
